name: Sole with Sundried Tomatoes (Libra)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sun-dried tomatoes: Reconstitute with water; do not use oil-packed product.
2. Preheat oven to 375°F.
3. In an ovenproof dish large enough for rolled-up fillets, add parsley sprigs and cup of white wine. Set aside.
4. In a small nonstick skillet, add remaining 3 teaspoons white wine. Add leeks and parsley; simmer over low heat.
5. Place sun-dried tomatoes in a bowl; cover with hot water. Let soften for 10 minutes, then drain.
6. Spread fish fillets on one end of the leaf-parsley mixture and place 1 sun-dried tomato. Roll each fillet seam side down and place in prepared dish over parsley.
7. Repeat with remaining fillets.
8. Cover dish with aluminum foil; bake for 15 minutes or until fish flakes easily.
9. Remove from oven and serve hot with wine sauce. Makes 4 servings.
